question: On the static habitat baseline with founder grace already enabled, does a modest cladogenesis ecology gate recover persistence without giving back the active-clade gain?
prediction: If short founder grace is letting weak founders survive long enough to dilute persistence, raising cladogenesisEcologyAdvantageThreshold from -1 to 0.1 should keep birth schedules matched, preserve positive persistent activity, and improve activeCladeDeltaVsNullMean.

raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied clade-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within a window contributed by clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.
raw.newAbundanceWeightedActivity: Population summed across occupied ticks within a window for clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.
raw.activeCladeAreaUnderCurve: Sum of active clade counts across all post-burn-in ticks, representing the total active-clade diversity over time.
raw.innovationMedianLifespan: Median observed lifetime (extinctTick - firstSeenTick, or maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades) across all clades.
raw.regimeSwitchCount: Count of tick-to-tick increases in active clades after drops, indicating regime shifts where diversity recovers after decline.

actual.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct clades and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades.
actual.persistentNewActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within an origin window contributed by clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
actual.persistentNewAbundanceWeightedActivity: Population summed across occupied ticks within an origin window for clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
actual.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin clades in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
actual.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
actual.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied clade-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within a window contributed by clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.
raw.newAbundanceWeightedActivity: Population summed across occupied ticks within a window for clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.
raw.activeCladeAreaUnderCurve: Sum of active clade counts across all post-burn-in ticks, representing the total active-clade diversity over time.

raw.regimeSwitchCount: Count of tick-to-tick increases in active clades after drops, indicating regime shifts where diversity recovers after decline.

matchedNull.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct clades and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades.
matchedNull.persistentNewActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within an origin window contributed by clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
matchedNull.persistentNewAbundanceWeightedActivity: Population summed across occupied ticks within an origin window for clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
matchedNull.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin clades in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
matchedNull.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
matchedNull.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

definition.matchedSchedule: For each seed and cladogenesis threshold, the pseudo-clade null preserves the observed clade birth count at every firstSeenTick.
definition.matchedFounderContext: matchedNullFounderContext=none matches birth ticks only. matchedNullFounderContext=founderHabitatBin also preserves, at each firstSeenTick, the count of founders in each habitat bin derived from founder habitat means. matchedNullFounderContext=founderHabitatAndCrowdingBin additionally preserves the joint founder habitat-bin and local-crowding-bin schedule.
definition.relabeling: Pseudo-clade founders are randomly selected from species born at each matched birth tick, and remaining species are randomly reassigned to pseudo-clades that were already active at the prior tick.
definition.diagnostics: Diagnostics compare per-seed raw new-clade activity, persistent activity, final population, and final active clade counts so founder suppression can be separated from post-founding persistence loss.
definition.dominantLossMode: matchedOrBetter means the actual clades are not behind the matched null on the tracked signals; founderSuppression means the main deficit appears before the persistence filter; persistenceFailure means the persistence filter widens the deficit; activeCladeDeficit means the final active clade count trails the matched null the most.
definition.actualToNullPersistentWindowFractionRati: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade persistentWindowFraction divided by matched-null persistentWindowFraction. Null when the matched-null fraction is zero.
definition.persistentWindowFractionDeltaVsNull: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade persistentWindowFraction minus matched-null persistentWindowFraction.
definition.actualToNullPersistentActivityMeanRatio: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean divided by matched-null postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean. Null when the matched-null mean is zero.
definition.persistentActivityMeanDeltaVsNull: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean minus matched-null postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean.
definition.actualToNullPersistentAbundanceWeightedA: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade postBurnInPersistentNewAbundanceWeightedActivityMean divided by matched-null postBurnInPersistentNewAbundanceWeightedActivityMean. Null when the matched-null mean is zero.
definition.persistentAbundanceWeightedActivityMeanD: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade postBurnInPersistentNewAbundanceWeightedActivityMean minus matched-null postBurnInPersistentNewAbundanceWeightedActivityMean.
